name: Lemon Pudding Withberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg substitute at high speed with an electric mixer for 1 minute.
2. Add 1/4 cup sugar; beat for 1 minute.
3. Add milk and the next three ingredients (grated lemon rind, butter, and lemon juice); beat well.
4. Gradually add flour, beating until well blended.
5. Pour 1.2 cups of the mixture into each of two (6 oz) custard cups coated with cooking spray.
6. Place the cups in a 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Add water to a depth of 1 inch.
8. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes or until set.
9. Remove cups from water and set aside.
10. In a microwave-safe bowl, combine 1 tablespoon sugar and the next four ingredients (cornstarch, grated lemon rind, fresh lemon juice, and blueberries). Stir well.
11. Microwave on High for 3 minutes or until thickened and bubbly; stir after 1 minute.
12. Spoon half of the mixture over each pudding.
